Package neqsim.process.safety.hazid

Class HAZOPTemplate.HAZOPDeviation

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.hazid.HAZOPTemplate.HAZOPDeviation
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:

public static class HAZOPTemplate.HAZOPDeviation extends Object implements Serializable
One row of a HAZOP worksheet.
